description_long: This is a large, amphora-style vase with a wide, flared mouth and two ornate handles extending from the neck to the shoulder. The body is predominantly black with intricate reddish-orange figural scenes, reminiscent of ancient Greek red-figure pottery, depicting human figures in dynamic poses. The rim is a contrasting light color with subtle brownish stains, and the handles are decorated with a beaded or dotted motif. The base is rounded and slightly elevated, providing stability. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and the painted scenes are detailed and well-preserved. This vase exudes a classical, museum-quality aesthetic, suitable for display in refined urban environments.
description: A large, glossy amphora-style vase with ornate handles and detailed reddish-orange figural scenes on a black background, reminiscent of ancient Greek pottery. The rim is light-colored and the surface is highly polished.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main figural scene with three human figures in dynamic poses and both handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the vase, the ornate handles, and the absence of the main figural scene.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same figural scene and both handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the handle and a partial view of the decorative motifs, with less of the main scene visible.
